problem id: 4575c0a2
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  10010101 -> 00100011
  00010011 -> 00100111
  11101101 -> 11010100
  11101011 -> 11011000
  01100011 -> 11000000
  00010100 -> 00101001
  01010100 -> 10101101
  10001101 -> 00010010

query: 11001011
predicted answer: 10011010
